text: Entering this space, I sense a harmonious blend of order and questioning. The pristine architecture outside suggests structure and clarity, yet moving into the R+D area, I am surrounded by artful ambiguity and thoughts about innovation. The displayed words resonate with my own inner confusion, but also invite curiosity—a playful willingness to dwell in uncertainty. I feel simultaneously disoriented and invigorated, as though standing at the threshold between the known and the possible.
